actionUnits.condition: Exercise AttachToElevator.OnTriggerEnter on platform2. Preconditions: BoxCollider (id 397541586) must be set to m_IsTrigger=1, and either platform2 or the Player must have a Rigidbody. The attached MonoBehaviour component (id 397541585; script guid 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77; field 'player' currently null) must have its 'player' reference set to the Player GameObject. When the Player's collider enters platform2's trigger, OnTriggerEnter should run. Note: current code checks if (gameObject == player); this will only execute if 'player' references platform2 itself, which likely prevents coverage of SetParent unless misconfigured and may cause invalid self-parenting.

Exercise AttachToElevator.OnTriggerExit on platform2. Same preconditions as OnTriggerEnter. After the Player leaves platform2's trigger, OnTriggerExit should run and clear the player's parent (player.transform.parent = null). Note: due to the code's condition (gameObject == player), this will only execute if 'player' references platform2 itself.
